violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the side storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2026
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026
The walk in freezer was observed with an excess of ice build up. Walk in freezer must be defrosted. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
The outside refuse area was observed with non-functioning equipment. Outside refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
The grease trap was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
There is in no functioning light in the walk in freezer. Freezer light must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, and floor by walk-in freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The tiles behind the 3-bay sink are in poor repair. The flooring by the walk-in freezer is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2024
